Title: Expert Certificate in Architectural Design - Cadd-Centre Kasaragod
Description: Our expert certificate course in architectural design focuses on creating detailed plans and blueprints for buildings and civil structures. With a special emphasis on cutting-edge Building Information Modeling (BIM), the program trains on architectural efficiency. Students will gain expertise in conceptualization, design development, and construction documentation, while receiving comprehensive training in CAD tools for sketching, detailed drawings, plans, models, and specifications.

Title: Cadd-Centre Kasaragod
Description:
Advance your career with industry-leading Interior Design
              training, hands-on CAD tools, and globally recognized
              certification.

Our expert certificate course in architectural design focuses on
              creating detailed plans and blueprints for buildings and civil
              structures. With a special emphasis on cutting-edge Building
              Information Modeling (BIM), the program trains on architectural
              efficiency. Students will gain expertise in conceptualization,
              design development, and construction documentation, while
              receiving comprehensive training in CAD tools for sketching,
              detailed drawings, plans, models, and specifications.

The Expert Certificate Program in BIM is designed to equip
              students with the knowledge and skills required to excel in the
              rapidly evolving field of Building Information Modeling. This
              program focuses on the practical application of BIM principles and
              tools, enabling participants to create, manage, and analyze
              intelligent 3D models for various construction and infrastructure
              projects.

Title: Master Certificate in BIM - Cadd-Centre Kasaragod
Description:
Advance your career with the Master Diploma in BIM at CADD Centre.
              Our advanced BIM course offers extensive certification training in
              AutoCAD, Revit, MEP design, and more. Benefit from expert-led
              instruction, hands-on projects, and comprehensive career support.
              Enroll now!
Duration:
Duration
  • Duration: 240 hours
  • Time: 3 hours per day
  • Mode: Part time/Full time/Intensive
  • Venue: in-centre Program

Program Overview

Master Certificate in BIM provides comprehensive training in essential areas of Building Information Modeling (BIM). It covers BIM concepts and standards, implementation strategies, 2D engineering drawing, and production drawing using software like Revit Architecture, Revit Structure, Civil 3D, and Revit MEP. Participants also learn about Common Data Environment (CDE) and collaborative project management with BIM 360. The program concludes with BIM coordination emphasizing clash detection and conflict resolution at LOD 350, preparing participants for real-world construction projects.

Key areas of training BIM

  • Introduction to BIM and Industry 4.0 Integration
